SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO OLIVIA RECORDS TO COMPLY WITH CRC 2.112 AND TO PLEAD A BASIS FOR CLAIMS AGAINST IT IF PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Deft, X-Complainant And X-Deft'S Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant The Olivia Companies, LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories is granted. Responses shall be made within 20 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Re Cross-Defts' 387 Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Cross-Complainants' Motion For Protective Order re: Cross-Defendants' 387 Special Interrogatories is denied. The court finds that the interrogatories are justified based upon the complexity and quantity of issues. These contention interrogatories properly inquire into the various and multiple allegations made in the complaint. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Employment Subpoenas (Amended)
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Cross-Complainants' Motion To Quash Employment Subpoenas is granted. The subpoenas are overly broad. Any subpoenas issued must be limited to salary, wages, commission or other remuneration paid and performance evaluations. All other employment or medical information is irrelevant, and there is no good cause for production. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion Toc Ompel The Production Of Witnesses For Deposition
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Cross-Complainants' Motion To Compel The Production Of Witnesses For Deposition is granted. The depositions shall be scheduled for dates no sooner than 20 days and no later than 30 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Motion For Protective Order Re Cross-Defts' 387 Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Quash Employment Subpoenas
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motio To Compel The Deposition Of Deft Employee Tiffany Jenkins
Off Calendar Dec-26-2007 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Further Answers Tos Pecial Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories And Mtn To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant The Olivia Companies LLC's Motion To Compel Further Answers To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, And To Compel Production Of Documents is granted in part.
As to all Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, and Requests for Production Of Documents, as Plaintiff has argued in its opposition that there are no documents, that verified supplemental response must be given.
As to Special Interrogatory Number 35, plaintiff is ordered to respond further as to the travel industry.
As to the Form Interrogatories, Plaintiff is ordered to respond further as agreed as to Numbers 215.1 and 215.2. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further as to Nos. 207.2, 210.4, and 212.3.
As to Request For Production Of Documents Numbers 8, 19, 20, 32, and 33, Plaintiff is ordered to respond further as agreed. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further to Numbers 1, 2, 9, 12, and 35. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further as to Numbers 15 and 16, narrowed to the allegations in her complaint.
Further responses shall be given within 15 days of notice of this order.
All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One And To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Amy Errett's Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And To Compel Production Of Documents is moot in part and granted in part. The court will not determine the adequacy of the supplemental responses to Form Interrogatory 17.1 on this motion. The reply contains the subject matter of any further meet and confer on that supplemental response. Defendant's production of documents shall be completed no later than November 19, 2007. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
